center.name: 利翁代國家公園
center.summary: 利翁代國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Lilian's lovebird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In 2004 its numbers in the wild were estimated to be less than 20,000 individuals. It currently inhabits Liwonde National Park (LNP) and a few cluster groups occur in the surrounding forests outside LNP

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In 2004 its numbers in the wild were estimated to be less than 20,000 individuals. It currently inhabits Liwonde National Park (LNP) and a few cluster groups occur in the surrounding forests outside LNP
